clusters.name: llm_as_workload_serving
clusters.description: LLM or GenAI treated as a workload to be served/optimized, not as the decision-making agent.
example_titles: SigMorph: A Transfer-Oriented Toolkit for Fingerprint Injection in Fine-Tuned Models
Bringing GenAI awareness to Workload Management (Industry Track)
Development of a Transformer-Based Large Language Model Architecture in Cloud

clusters.name: classical_marl_without_llm
clusters.description: Multi-agent reinforcement learning or classical RL for resource management without LLM-driven reasoning.
example_titles: BAAM: An Inferential Multi-agent Modeling for Energy-Optimized Job Scheduling in Green Data Centers
Flash-Attention-Enhanced Multi-Agent Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient for Mobile Edge Computing in Digital Twin-Powered Internet of Things
Dual-Circulation Generative AI for Optimizing Resource Allocation in Multi-Granularity Heterogeneous Federated Learning

clusters.name: out_of_scope_domain
clusters.description: Agentic AI applied to domains outside cloud/edge RM (6G, cybersecurity threat detection, general AIOps).
example_titles: Integrating Generative AI with Network Digital Twin for 6G: An Edge-Cloud Collaborative Approach
Integrating LLM and GenAI for CyberSecure and Adaptive Resource Management in Large-Scale Wireless Sensor Networks
Comparative Analysis of GPT-2 and Gemini for Automated Generation of Dockerfiles and Docker Compose in DevOps Workflows

clusters.name: agentic_ai_core_for_rm
clusters.description: Agentic AI (LLM-backed) systems where the autonomous loop directly drives resource management decisions.
example_titles: Intelligent Kubernetes Autoscaling Through Generative AI-Driven Workload Predictions
LLM-Based Adaptive Digital Twin Allocation for Microservice Workloads
MicroIntent: Intent-Based Placement Strategy for Microservice Application in the Compute Continuum Using LLMs

clusters.name: survey_review_excluded
clusters.description: Surveys, systematic reviews, or document-type exclusions per manual review rules.
example_titles: Towards Secure Cloud-Native Computing: Unveiling Kubernetes Misconfigurations with Large Language Models
Transforming 6G Mobile Edge Intelligence With Large Models

clusters.name: demo_without_evaluation
clusters.description: Demo or proof-of-concept without formal evaluation, per manual rule exclusion.
example_titles: Demo: Conversational AI Agent for ML Infrastructure Monitoring and Analysis

clusters.name: security_not_resource_mgmt
clusters.description: Agentic AI applied to security (threat analysis, misconfiguration detection), not resource management.
example_titles: A Novel LLM Approach of Cybersecurity Threat Analysis and Response

clusters.name: ambiguous_unclear
clusters.description: Papers with insufficient evidence in abstract to classify; requires full-text review.
example_titles: An AI-native application assemble platform for easy-integrating of AIGC based services

clusters.name: aiops_generic_not_agentic
clusters.description: Generic AIOps without clear agentic loop for autonomous resource management decisions.
example_titles: NextGen AI-Infused IT Operations Model: Revolutionizing Application Maintenance for Modern Enterprises
